avatarScaling.title: Ukulinganisa Usayizi we-Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: Isakhiwo semvelo se-VRChat sokulinganisa ubude nge-OSC — isebenza kuyi-avatar noma iyiphi
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Amankinombho ashesha asebenza indawo yonke (ngisho noVRChat unokugxila). Uma inkinombho ingaqophi, usengakwazi ukusebenzisa isilayidi esingenhla.
translator.title: Isihumushi
translator.aiGrammarFix: Lungisa uhlelo lolimi nge-AI kuqala (isebenzisa umhlinzeki we-IntelliChat ongenhla)
translator.note: Isetshenziswa yinketho yokuhumusha yebhokisi yengxoxo ye-Live Typing, nakuyiphi indawo enye ku-app enikeza inketho ethi "Humusha ngaphambi kokuthumela."
liveTyping.title: Ukubhala Bukhoma
liveTyping.subtitle: kuthumela ngoba nje uthayipha, njengebhokisi yengxoxo ka-VRChat uqobo
liveTyping.placeholder: Thayipha lapha — lokhu kuthunyelwa ebhokisini lengxoxo ngokuzenzakalelayo emizuzwaneni embalwa njengoba uthayipha. Qhubeka uthayipha ngale kwezinhlamvu ezingu-144; i-VRChat izobonisa '…' kanye nesiqephu sokugcina somlayezo wakho.
languagePicker.title: Khetha ulimi lwakho
languagePicker.subtitle: Ungakushintsha lokhu kamuva kuzilungiselelo.
settingsLanguage.title: Ulimi
settingsLanguage.label: Ulimi Lwe-app
